_comment: HuggingFace Daily Papers filter config. OR-combined across categories: any match keeps the paper. min_upvotes is an independent AND threshold.
_comment_top_n: After sorting by upvotes desc, keep top N; 0 = no limit
_comment_authors: Author name substring match, e.g. ['Ilya Sutskever']
_comment_keywords: Case-insensitive substring match against ai_keywords / title / summary
_comment_always_include_orgs: Hits here bypass min_upvotes / top_n (key vendors are always included)
